default_card_0_desc: Saadaali hoos u dhaca lacagta ka hor inta aysan faa'iidadaada saameyn
default_card_0_query: Ii saadaali waxa ku dhici doona faa'iidadayda haddii GBP uu 10% ka hooseeyo lacagta aan wax ku soo dejiyo
default_card_1_desc: Qiimee alaab-qeybiye kasta gaarsiinta iyo saameynta
default_card_1_query: Qiimee alaab-qeybiyeyaashayda iyadoo lagu saleynayo heerka gaarsiinta waqtiga saxda ah iyo saameynta maaliyadeed
default_card_2_desc: Qiimaha runta ah: qiimaha alaab-qeybiyaha + xamuul + kastam + sarrif
default_card_2_query: Xisaabi qiimaha runta ah ee soo-dejinta oo ay ku jiraan xamuulka, kastamka, canshuurta iyo kaydka sarrifka
default_card_3_desc: Hel wadanka ugu wanaagsan ee aad ku ballaarto marka xigta
default_card_3_query: Suuqee dhoofin ah ayaan ku ballaarin karaa marka xigta iyadoo lagu saleynayo badeecadayda?
pos_card_0_desc: Dakhliga tooska ah iyo tirada macaamil
pos_card_0_query: Waa maxay iibka POS-kayga maanta? I tus dakhliga, tirada macaamil, iyo badeecooyinka ugu iibka badan.
pos_card_1_query: Waa maxay 10-ka badeeco ee ugu iibka badan usbuucan iyadoo lagu saleynayo dakhliga iyo tirada?
pos_card_2_query: I tus waxqabadka shaqaalaha — iibka keeshiye kasta, celceliska qiimaha macaamil, iyo tirada macaamil.
pos_card_3_query: Badeecooyinkee ayaa kaydkooda hooseeya? I tus alaabta ka hoosaysa xadka dib-u-dalabka.
stripe_card_0_query: I tus dakhligayga Stripe bishan — wadarta lacag-bixinta, celinta, iyo dakhliga saafiga ah.
stripe_card_1_query: Isbarbardhig dakhligayga Stripe ee bishan iyo bishii hore. Waa maxay heerka kobaca?
stripe_card_2_query: Immisa lacag-bixin ah ayaa ii fashilmay bishan? Waa maxay wadarta dakhliga la lumiyay?
stripe_card_3_query: Waa maxay celceliska qiimaha dalabkayga bishan, sidee buuna la barbardhigmaa bishii hore?
shopify_card_0_query: I tus iibkayga Shopify maanta — dalabyada, dakhliga, iyo badeecooyinka ugu iibka badan.
shopify_card_1_query: Badeecooyinkee Shopify ayaa kaydkoodu hooseeyaa? I tus alaabta ka yar 10 xabbo.
shopify_card_2_query: Waa maxay heerka celinta iyo soo-celinta Shopify bishan? Badeecooyinkee ayaa leh heerka celinta ugu sarreeya?
shopify_card_3_query: Waa maxay badeecooyinkayga Shopify ee ugu iibka badan usbuucan iyadoo lagu saleynayo dakhliga?
xero_card_0_desc: Sawir gaaban oo faa'iido iyo khasaare
xero_card_0_query: I sii kooban faa'iido iyo khasaare oo bishan ah oo laga soo qaatay xogtayda Xero.
xero_card_1_desc: Lacag soo gasha iyo mid baxda
xero_card_1_query: Sidee buu u eg yahay socodka lacagtayda? I tus lacagta soo gasha, lacagta baxda, iyo xaaladda saafiga ah.
xero_card_2_desc: Aan la bixin iyo mid dib u dhacay
xero_card_2_query: Immisa biil ah oo aan la bixin ayaan hayaa? Waa maxay wadarta lacagta dib u dhacday?
xero_card_3_query: Ii kala qeybi kharashaadkayga qaybo bishan. Waa maxay meelaha kharashka ugu badan?
quickbooks_card_0_desc: Sawir gaaban oo faa'iido iyo khasaare
quickbooks_card_0_query: I sii kooban faa'iido iyo khasaare oo bishan ah oo laga soo qaatay xogtayda QuickBooks.
quickbooks_card_1_desc: Lacag soo gasha iyo mid baxda
quickbooks_card_1_query: Sidee buu u eg yahay socodka lacagtayda ee QuickBooks?
quickbooks_card_2_desc: Aan la bixin iyo mid dib u dhacay
quickbooks_card_2_query: Immisa biil ah oo aan la bixin ayaan ku hayaa QuickBooks?
quickbooks_card_3_query: Ii kala qeybi kharashaadkayga qaybo bishan oo laga soo qaatay QuickBooks.
amazon_fba_card_0_query: I tus iibkayga Amazon FBA bishan — dalabyada, dakhliga, iyo ASIN-yada ugu sarreeya.
amazon_fba_card_1_query: Ii kala qeybi khidmadaha Amazon FBA ee bishan — gaarsiin, kaydin, gudbin.
amazon_fba_card_2_query: Waa maxay 10-ka badeeco ee Amazon ee ugu faa'iidada badan ka dib khidmadaha FBA?
amazon_fba_card_3_query: Badeecooyinkee Amazon ayaa leh heerka celinta ugu sarreeya?
cfo_card_0_desc: Dakhli, kharashaad, iyo faa'iido saafi ah
cfo_card_0_query: I sii kooban faafiican oo faa'iido iyo khasaare ah oo bishan ah oo leh isbarbardhig bil-ka-bil ah.
cfo_card_1_query: Waa maxay EBITDA-dayda hadda iyo heerka faa'iidada EBITDA? Ii qiyaas qiimaha ganacsigayga.
cfo_card_2_query: I tus socodka lacagtayda — lacag soo gasha, lacag baxda, iyo bilaha muddo-taageeraha.
cfo_card_3_query: I tus kobaca dakhliga bil-ka-bil iyo isbeddellada faa'iidada 6-dii bilood ee la soo dhaafay.

scenario_tooltip: Ku socodsii xaalad “maxaa dhici lahaa” ganacsigaaga
cfo_tooltip: U beddel warbixinno nooca xisaabiye leh oo cabbirro iyo shaxdo leh
empty_greeting: Wax kasta oo ku saabsan ganacsigaaga i weyddii
empty_subtitle: Kaliya af Ingiriisi fudud — erayo adag ma laha, xaashiyo xisaabeed looma baahna.
connect_cta_title: Ka hel jawaabo tirooyinkaaga dhabta ah
connect_cta_desc: Ku xir Shopify, Amazon, QuickBooks ama soo deji fayl CSV ah
limit_body: Waxaad isticmaashay dhammaan su'aalahaaga bilaashka ah ee bishan. Kor u qaad si aad u sii wadato.
limit_reset_note: Qorshaha bilaashka ah bisha xigta ayuu dib u bilaabmi doonaa.
connection_error: Dhibaato xiriir — fadlan hubi intarnetkaaga oo isku day mar kale.
status_connect_link: Ku xir dukaankaaga ama soo deji fayl
status_personalised_suffix: si aad u hesho jawaabo gaar kuu ah
